backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining e-commerce types (Product, Order, UserProfile) and implementing CRUD operations for products, orders, and user profiles with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to diagnosing and testing the TanStack Router /admin path configuration issue, both referencing frontend/src/App.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components, pages, hooks, and contexts including routing setup, admin panel access, cart/wishlist management, product display, and user authentication flows.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for UI elements including sidebar, charts, and semantic tokens (primary, secondary, destructive, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the StudyNeeds React application with SEO meta tags, favicon reference, and script tag loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, shop, cart, checkout, admin) and wrapping the app with CartProvider, WishlistProvider, WhatsAppButton, and ProfileSetupModal; admin route includes validateSearch to fix routing errors.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: Modal for viewing and managing order details including customer info, delivery address, order items, and status. Allows admin to update order status with a dropdown selector.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin dashboard component for managing orders with filtering by status, displaying orders in a table with customer details, order totals, and actions. Shows total revenue and allows viewing individual order details.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Modal form for adding or editing products with fields for name, category, price, discount, stock, rating, description, and image upload. Handles image preview and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin component for managing products with search, category filtering, add/edit/delete functionality, and a table view of all products. Uses React Query hooks for fetching and mutating product data.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserDetail: Modal dialog component that displays detailed user information including profile data, order statistics, and complete order history with status badges. Fetches and filters orders specific to the selected user.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin component for viewing and managing registered users with search functionality and a table displaying user profiles, registration dates, and order counts. Includes a detail view modal for individual users.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin status before rendering admin dashboard, showing loading states during verification and unauthorized messages with redirect for non-admin users.
frontend/src/components/BannerSlider.tsx: Auto-rotating carousel component displaying 5 promotional banners with manual navigation arrows, dot indicators, and 5-second auto-advance interval.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesMenu.t: Modal overlay component that displays a grid of 8 product categories (Books, Stationery, School Bags, etc.) with icons and links to category pages. Includes a close button and click-outside-to-close functionality.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesSectio: Homepage section component that renders a grid of 8 product categories with icons, each linking to its respective shop page. Features hover animations and responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with four columns (About, Policies, Contact, Newsletter), social media links, newsletter subscription form, and copyright notice. Includes contact information and company links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main site header with logo, search bar, location selector, cart, and authentication controls. Includes mobile menu toggle, admin panel link for authorized users, and sticky positioning.
frontend/src/components/LocationSelector: Modal component for selecting delivery location from a grid of 12 Indian cities. Features visual selection state and auto-closes after selection.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: Slide-in mobile navigation menu with links to Home, Shop, and Admin Panel (if authorized). Includes authentication controls and backdrop overlay.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product display card showing image, name, price, discount badge, rating, and action buttons (Add to Cart, Buy Now, Wishlist). Links to product detail page with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductSection.t: Reusable section component that displays a titled grid of up to 8 products using ProductCard components. Returns null if no products are provided.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal component for user profile setup with form fields for name, email, phone, and address. Uses useSaveCallerUserProfile hook to persist profile data and displays toast notifications on success/error.
Displays a grid of four service cards (E-Commerce, Home Tuition, Documentation, Career Counselling) with icons, descriptions, and action buttons. Only E-Commerce is currently available; others show 'Coming Soon' badges.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Carousel component displaying customer testimonials with ratings, names, and roles. Includes navigation buttons to cycle through four hardcoded testimonials.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with a predefined phone number and message.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays five feature cards (Trusted Platform, Affordable Pricing, Local Support, Verified Teachers, Fast Delivery) in a grid layout with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context provider for shopping cart functionality with localStorage persistence, supporting add/update/remove operations and calculating total items and prices with discount handling.
frontend/src/context/WishlistContext.tsx: React context provider for wishlist functionality with localStorage persistence, allowing users to add/remove products and check if items are in the wishlist.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, with proper loading states and retry handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating data from the backend actor, including product queries, order placement, user profiles, and admin-specific queries for products, orders, and users.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Re-exports the wishlist context hook for accessing wishlist functionality throughout the application.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind directives, custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, and StudyNeeds brand colors using the Poppins font family.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying summary cards for products, orders, users, and revenue, with tabbed management interfaces for products, orders, and users.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, price calculations including delivery charges, and navigation to checkout or back to shopping.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with delivery address form, payment method selection (online/COD), order summary, and order placement functionality requiring user authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring banner slider, categories, multiple product sections (trending, school essentials, budget deals, furniture), services, testimonials, and why-choose sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page displaying success message with delivery timeline (3-5 business days) and navigation options to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Product detail page component displaying product images, pricing with discounts, quantity selector, add-to-cart and buy-now buttons, product specifications, and related products section with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page with category sidebar navigation, product grid display, and sorting options (popularity, price, rating) that filters products by category and displays them using ProductCard components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, Poppins font family, extended theme tokens for UI components, and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining StudyNeeds as a multi-service student platform with e-commerce, tuition marketplace, and documentation services, tracking implemented features and noting an admin panel routing issue.
